recommended_actions_7d: Update to Crawl4AI version 0.8.7 or later
title: CVE-2026-56260: Crawl4AI RCE
summary: [P2] Crawl4AI before 0.8.7 contains an arbitrary file write vulnerability, allowing for potential RCE. No patch is available, and exploitation in the wild has not been reported. Why now: Reported attribution (unverified): None (confidence: 0.80)
classification_reasoning: Crawl4AI vulnerability allows for RCE, affecting the application layer.

recommended_actions_7d: Update to Capgo version 12.128.2 or later
title: CVE-2026-56313: Capgo Cross-Organization Disruption
summary: [P2] Capgo before 12.128.2 contains a cross-organization account disruption vulnerability. No patch is available, and exploitation in the wild has not been reported. Why now: Reported attribution (unverified): None (confidence: 0.80)
classification_reasoning: Capgo vulnerability allows for cross-organization disruption, affecting the application layer.

recommended_actions_7d: Update to OpenWrt with fixed luci-app-samba4
title: CVE-2026-59260: OpenWrt Luci-App-Samba4 Read ACL
summary: [P2] OpenWrt luci-app-samba4 read ACL grants file.exec permission on /usr/sbin/smbd. No patch is available, and exploitation in the wild has not been reported. Why now: Reported attribution (unverified): None (confidence: 0.80)
classification_reasoning: OpenWrt vulnerability allows for read ACL, affecting the foundation layer.
